steps.title: Find the sphere radius
steps.content:
The diameter is $29.000$ centimeters, so the radius is half the diameter.
$$r=\frac{29.000}{2}=14.5$$

steps.title: Multiply by the density
steps.content: Mass equals density times volume. Round to the nearest whole number. $$2.8000(12{,}770.04)= 35{,}756$$ The answer is 35756.
